time_sensitivity.label: Time Sensitivity
time_sensitivity.description: How quickly action is needed to capture the opportunity

strategic_alignment.label: Strategic Alignment
strategic_alignment.description: Alignment with VPG priorities, current initiatives, target accounts, and key verticals

scale.10: Directly supports current initiative or target account

competitive_pressure.label: Competitive Pressure
competitive_pressure.description: Risk of competitor gaining advantage if VPG does not act

signal_types.label: Trade & Tariff
signal_types.action_template: Supply chain impact + India production advantage talking points

revenue_impact.rationale: Individual design wins range $50K–$500K+ but volume is lower than commodity; weight slightly below default

time_sensitivity.rationale: Longer design-in cycles (6–18 months) reduce urgency vs. transactional BUs; early intelligence matters more

strategic_alignment.rationale: Semiconductor ATE, aerospace/defense, and EV/BMS are declared growth vectors; weight increased

competitive_pressure.rationale: Isabellenhütte and Bourns/Riedon aggressively targeting EV space; competitive monitoring is critical

government_procurement.description: Scoring adjustments for government and public procurement portal signals

revenue_impact.rationale: Government contracts are typically higher-value and longer-term than commercial one-off orders; design-in locks in multi-year revenue

time_sensitivity.rationale: Procurement portals publish response deadlines; agent calculates days remaining (< 30 days = high urgency)

strategic_alignment.rationale: NASA/DoD score higher than civilian agencies; space programs score highest due to EEE-INST-002 qualification advantage

competitive_pressure.rationale: Sole-source notices naming a competitor are the highest-priority competitive signal; requires immediate review

validation_override.rationale: Government procurement portals are inherently validated (official government publication); exempt from 3-source requirement

deduplication.description: SAM.gov Contract Opportunities and Contract Awards share solicitation IDs (PIID); use as deduplication key

space_qualification_registry.description: Scoring adjustments for space qualification registry signals (ESCC, NEPP)

revenue_impact.rationale: Qualification changes directly impact product positioning on multi-million dollar space programs

strategic_alignment.rationale: Space qualification is a core VPG Foil Resistors differentiator

validation_override.rationale: Space agency qualification registries are authoritative sources; exempt from 3-source requirement

validation_levels.label: LIKELY
validation_levels.description: Supported by 2 sources - use with context

validation_levels.label: UNVERIFIED
validation_levels.description: Single source only - included due to high impact score
